description_long: This is a grand piano with a rich, dark wood finish and a classic, elegant design. The body features a curved right side and a straight left edge, typical of grand pianos, with a smooth, polished surface that highlights the wood grain. The front displays a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and the brand name 'TOMBEARD CO.' is inscribed above the keys. Three metallic pedals are visible beneath the keyboard, supported by a sturdy wooden frame and legs. The lid is fully closed, giving the piano a seamless, solid appearance from all angles. No music stand is present on the top surface.
description: A dark wood grand piano with a polished finish, full keyboard, and three pedals, featuring the brand 'TOMBEARD CO.' on the front. The lid is fully closed and no music stand is visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three pedals, and the 'TOMBEARD CO.' brand above the keys.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight edge, thick wooden body, and closed lid with no visible keys or pedals.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curved back and solid wood surface, with no keys or pedals visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the curved body, closed lid, and sturdy wooden legs, with no keys or pedals visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard 88-key layout with alternating white and black keys, no missing or non-standard keys.
